If I could rate Kinda Pregnant negative stars, I would. This so-called “comedy” is an insufferable, self-indulgent mess that drags on like a bad joke with no punchline. Amy Schumer delivers a performance so lazy and uninspired, it feels like she’s daring the audience to suffer through it.

The humor? Nonexistent. The writing? A trainwreck of predictable, worn-out tropes that Schumer has run into the ground. It’s a tedious, painfully unfunny slog that mistakes crude oversharing for comedy and expects the audience to applaud. If you have any sense of taste, do yourself a favor and avoid this disaster at all costs.
